name: Chili-Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
You can use one can of sweet green chiles or jalapenos that have been chopped.
2. Mix the cheese, peppers, and mayonnaise, blending well.
3. Spread the mixture on the cut surface of the French bread, which has been sliced in half horizontally.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes.
5. Cut into thick slices and serve hot.
